evals.name: full-review
evals.expected_output: Three-phase review report covering integration verification, architectural coherence, and triage. Should gracefully degrade (no briefing exists). Should produce review/reports/ files and display a structured summary.

assertions.name: briefing_degradation_warning
assertions.description: Warns about missing briefing and suggests /review-briefing

assertions.name: three_phases_present
assertions.description: Contains distinct sections for Phase 1, Phase 2, and Phase 3

assertions.name: lint_or_typecheck_executed
assertions.description: Reports lint or typecheck results with specifics

assertions.name: stubs_identified
assertions.description: Identifies at least one stub/TODO with file location

assertions.name: report_files_saved
assertions.description: Saves structured report files to outputs directory

assertions.name: structured_summary_format
assertions.description: Final output uses structured per-phase format

evals.name: scoped-fused-memory
evals.expected_output: Review scoped to the fused-memory subproject only. Should narrow test/lint/scan scope to fused-memory/. Same three phases but constrained.

assertions.name: scope_respected
assertions.description: Findings reference fused-memory, not other subprojects

assertions.name: stubs_in_fused_memory
assertions.description: Finds stubs within fused-memory source code

evals.name: phase1-only
evals.expected_output: Phase 1 only — run tests, lint, typecheck, smoke tests. Save phase1 report to review/reports/. No Phase 2 or Phase 3.

assertions.name: only_phase1
assertions.description: No Phase 2 or Phase 3 content in output

assertions.name: phase1_report_saved
assertions.description: Phase 1 report file exists in outputs

assertions.name: smoke_tests_skipped
assertions.description: Notes smoke tests skipped due to missing briefing
